name: Sweet and Sour Beef Over Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boneless chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
1. Mix together flour, salt, and pepper and dredge meat cubes in the mixture.
2. In a skillet, heat margarine and olive oil over medium heat. Brown beef cubes until browned on all sides.
3. Place browned beef into the Crock-Pot.
4. Add remaining ingredients except for carrots to the Crock-Pot.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 8-9 hours or on High for 4-5 hours.
6. Stir in carrots and continue cooking on Low for 1.5 hours or on High for 30 minutes.
7. Serve over rice or noodles.
